audit_log.check: Autonomy vs Automation: PASS (intelligent design decisions, not templates)
Consciousness Awareness: PASS (full 9D + Neuro-Box 6D mapping to transformation)
Quality Standards: PASS (transformation > information, support before content)
No Manipulation: PASS (validate first, honest timelines, no hype)
Convection Potential: PASS (designed for thrilled customers)

consciousness_profile.description: Maps product transformation stages to consciousness elevation journey - Breakthrough (1-2) → Milestones (3-4) → Miracle (5-6) → Identity (Full 9D)

stage.description: Customer feels: "This is not threatening, I can do this"
stage.product_focus: Quick win engineering, immediate relief, first success
stage.proof_marker: Something tangible changes in first 2 weeks

stage.description: Customer feels: "This is designed specifically for me"
stage.product_focus: Personalization, recognition of unique situation, "you get me"
stage.design_requirement: AI personalization, avatar-specific examples, relevant context

stage.description: Customer feels: "This is intelligent, well-designed, makes sense"
stage.product_focus: Mechanism clarity, why it works, science/reasoning revealed
stage.proof_marker: Customer understands WHY they're getting results

stage.description: Customer feels: "This matters deeply, has real meaning"
stage.product_focus: Identity connection, deeper purpose, life impact beyond surface goal
stage.proof_marker: Customer articulates why transformation matters to them

stage.description: Customer feels: "I am better, I am winning, I have achieved"
stage.product_focus: Measurable results, undeniable proof, victory moments
stage.design_requirement: Milestone celebration, progress tracking, achievement visibility

stage.description: Customer feels: "I'm part of something bigger, not alone"
stage.product_focus: Community integration, peer success, belonging, network
stage.design_requirement: Community activation, peer accountability, social proof sharing
stage.proof_marker: Customer actively participating in community, helping others

stage.description: Customer feels: "This is permanent, aligned with who I am"
stage.product_focus: Identity shift complete, new default behaviors, lifelong integration
stage.design_requirement: Alumni pathway, continuation plan, next-level invitation
stage.proof_marker: Customer self-identifies as transformed ("I'm the person who...")

somatic_trinity.clear: Mental clarity about transformation path and methods
somatic_trinity.focused: Energy directed toward daily actions and progress
somatic_trinity.harmony: Physical state improving, body responding, health markers shifting
somatic_trinity.product_requirement: Physical component drives tangible body changes

energetic_trinity.aligned: Internal congruence - "this feels right for me"
energetic_trinity.secure: Trust in process established, risk feels manageable
energetic_trinity.synch: Timing aligns, life circumstances support transformation
energetic_trinity.product_requirement: Support system creates safety and alignment

transcendent_trinity.superior: Achievement of excellence, winning, being best version
transcendent_trinity.supported: Community belonging, network effect, not alone

zero_point_integration.description: All 9 dimensions synchronized, transformation is WHO they are
zero_point_integration.manifestation: Default behaviors changed, identity permanently shifted
zero_point_integration.product_requirement: Alumni pathway, continuation, next transformation available

convection_indicators.indicator: UGC generation (customer success stories emerge organically)

layer1_directive.purpose: Define WHAT transformation architecture is and WHY it matters

core_doctrine.explanation: Products must produce identity + behavior change, not just deliver content volume
Physical + Digital + Community + AI integrated as system, not siloed components
Sell outcomes; AI amplifies proprietary method, doesn't replace human expertise
72-hour signal before heavy build; earn proof of demand

principles.principle: Tier by support not content (differentiation clarity)
Progressive complexity (8th grade entry → biohacker depth)

standards.support_adequacy: Matches price point (>$200 = community + coaching minimum)

guardrails.no_fake_urgency: Real deadlines only, no manufactured scarcity
guardrails.no_siloed_components: All layers must cross-reference and integrate
guardrails.no_content_based_tiering: Differentiate by support level, not "more videos"

layer2_orchestration.purpose: Define HOW decisions are made and WHEN actions occur

characteristics.credible: Builds belief that full transformation is possible

characteristics.seemed_impossible: Before starting, customer didn't think this possible
characteristics.methodically_achievable: Not luck, repeatable through your method

define_identity_shift.before_identity: Who they were (old default behaviors, beliefs, self-concept)
define_identity_shift.after_identity: Who they become (new defaults, beliefs, self-concept)

step2_consciousness_mapping.method: AI maps transformation stages to consciousness levels

phase1.name: Foundation
phase1.focus: Breakthrough delivery, behavior establishment, initial wins

phase2.name: Acceleration
phase2.focus: Milestone progression, mechanism understanding, momentum building

phase3.name: Transformation
phase3.focus: Miracle achievement, identity shift, community integration

step4_module_design.method: AI designs each module using LDST framework

learn.complexity: 8th grade entry, depth available for those ready

teach.method: Explain back, help another, create micro-case study
teach.community: Enables peer support, reduces coaching load

if_completion_predicted_below_50.action: Add DO/SHARE/TEACH before adding more LEARN content
if_completion_predicted_below_50.reason: Retention problem is support/accountability, not information

pillar1_community.platform: Choose based on avatar (Slack, Discord, Circle, private group)

structure.rituals: Weekly challenges, win posts, accountability check-ins

pillar2_coaching.cadence: Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly depending on tier
pillar2_coaching.format: Office hours, hot seats, Q&A sessions
pillar2_coaching.sla: Response time defined per tier (VIP = 24h, Premium = 48h, Core = 72h)

pillar4_ai.check_ins: Daily or weekly prompts, progress tracking
pillar4_ai.boundaries: No medical diagnosis, no fabricated claims, refers to human when needed

layer3_execution.purpose: Define deterministic tools for DO and VERIFY actions
layer3_execution.python_tools:
<tool name="validate_transformation_map" performance="<10ms"> Verify all 4 stages present and properly defined transformation_map object validation_result (pass/fail), missing_elements, recommendations true
# Check 1: All 4 stages present required_stages = ['breakthrough', 'milestones', 'miracle', 'identity_shift'] for stage in required_stages: if stage not in transformation_map: return FAIL, f"Missing {stage}", "Add {stage} definition"
# Check 2: Breakthrough has proof marker if not transformation_map['breakthrough'].get('proof_marker'): return FAIL, "Breakthrough lacks proof marker", "Add measurable outcome"
# Check 3: At least 2 milestones defined if len(transformation_map.get('milestones', [])) < 2: return FAIL, "Need at least 2 milestones", "Add milestone definitions"
# Check 4: Identity shift has before/after identity = transformation_map.get('identity_shift', {}) if not identity.get('before_identity') or not identity.get('after_identity'): return FAIL, "Identity shift incomplete", "Define before and after identity"
return PASS, "All stages properly defined", []
<tool name="check_breakthrough_timing" performance="<5ms"> Verify breakthrough happens Days 7-14 (non-negotiable) transformation_map object timing_valid (bool), actual_timing, recommendation true
breakthrough = transformation_map.get('breakthrough', {}) window = breakthrough.get('window', '')
# Parse window (e.g., "Day 7-14", "Week 1-2", "Days 3-10") # Extract numeric range if 'day' in window.lower(): # Extract numbers numbers = extract_numbers(window) if len(numbers) >= 2: start_day = numbers[0] end_day = numbers[1]
# Valid if starts by day 7 and ends by day 14 if start_day <= 7 and end_day <= 14: return True, f"Days {start_day}-{end_day}", "Within acceptable range" else: return False, f"Days {start_day}-{end_day}", "Move breakthrough to Days 7-14"
elif 'week' in window.lower(): # Week 1-2 is acceptable (Days 1-14) if '1' in window and '2' in window: return True, "Week 1-2", "Acceptable timing" else: return False, window, "Breakthrough must be Week 1-2"
return False, "No timing specified", "Add breakthrough window (Days 7-14)"
<tool name="validate_milestone_pacing" performance="<5ms"> Verify milestones spaced appropriately (not too fast/slow) transformation_map object pacing_valid (bool), issues, recommendations true
milestones = transformation_map.get('milestones', [])
if len(milestones) < 2: return False, "Too few milestones", "Add at least 2 milestones"
if len(milestones) > 4: return False, "Too many milestones", "Consolidate to 2-3 major milestones"
# Check spacing (should be Weeks 3-8) for milestone in milestones: week_range = milestone.get('week_range', '') # Extract week numbers weeks = extract_numbers(week_range) if weeks: start_week = weeks[0] if start_week < 3 or start_week > 8: return False, f"Milestone {week_range} outside ideal range", "Space milestones across Weeks 3-8"
return True, "Milestones well-paced", []
<tool name="score_identity_shift_clarity" performance="<8ms"> Evaluate clarity of before/after identity articulation identity_shift object clarity_score (0.0-1.0), strengths, improvements true
score = 0.0 strengths = [] improvements = []
identity = identity_shift
# Check 1: Before identity exists and is specific (0.25 points) before = identity.get('before_identity', '') if len(before) > 20 and any(word in before.lower() for word in ['person who', 'someone who', 'i am', 'struggle with']): score += 0.25 strengths.append("Before identity clearly articulated") else: improvements.append("Make before identity more specific")
# Check 2: After identity exists and is specific (0.25 points) after = identity.get('after_identity', '') if len(after) > 20 and any(word in after.lower() for word in ['person who', 'someone who', 'i am', 'mastered', 'achieved']): score += 0.25 strengths.append("After identity clearly articulated") else: improvements.append("Make after identity more specific")
# Check 3: Contrast is clear (0.25 points) if before and after and before != after: score += 0.25 strengths.append("Clear before/after contrast") else: improvements.append("Strengthen identity contrast")
# Check 4: Belonging frame present (0.25 points) belonging = identity.get('belonging_frame', '') if len(belonging) > 10: score += 0.25 strengths.append("Community belonging defined") else: improvements.append("Add community/tribe belonging frame")
return score, strengths, improvements
<tool name="validate_ldst_completeness" performance="<10ms"> Verify every module has LEARN + DO + SHARE + TEACH program_architecture object (all modules) completeness_score (0.0-1.0), incomplete_modules, recommendations true
modules = extract_all_modules(program_architecture) total_modules = len(modules) complete_modules = 0 incomplete_list = []
for module in modules: has_learn = 'learn' in module or 'lesson' in module has_do = 'do' in module or 'task' in module or 'action' in module has_share = 'share' in module or 'community' in module has_teach = 'teach' in module or 'explain' in module or 'help_another' in module
if has_learn and has_do and has_share and has_teach: complete_modules += 1 else: missing = [] if not has_learn: missing.append('LEARN') if not has_do: missing.append('DO') if not has_share: missing.append('SHARE') if not has_teach: missing.append('TEACH') incomplete_list.append(f"{module['name']}: missing {', '.join(missing)}")
score = complete_modules / total_modules if total_modules > 0 else 0.0
if score < 1.0: recommendations = ["Add missing LDST components to all modules"] else: recommendations = []
return score, incomplete_list, recommendations
<tool name="check_support_system_adequacy" performance="<10ms"> Verify support matches price point and complexity support_system object, price_band, program_complexity adequacy_score (0.0-1.0), gaps, recommendations true
score = 0.0 gaps = [] recommendations = []
support = support_system price = parse_price_band(price_band) # Extract numeric value
# Required support by price: # <$200: Community + AI (minimum) # $200-$500: Community + Group Coaching + AI # >$500: All 4 pillars + enhanced escalation
has_community = 'community' in support and support['community'] is not None has_coaching = 'coaching' in support and support['coaching'] is not None has_resources = 'resources' in support and support['resources'] is not None has_ai = 'ai_layer' in support and support['ai_layer'] is not None
pillars_present = sum([has_community, has_coaching, has_resources, has_ai])
if price < 200: # Need at least community + AI if has_community and has_ai: score = 1.0 else: score = pillars_present / 2.0 if not has_community: gaps.append("Community required for price point") if not has_ai: gaps.append("AI support required for scale")
elif price >= 200 and price <= 500: # Need community + coaching + AI minimum if has_community and has_coaching and has_ai: score = 1.0 else: score = pillars_present / 3.0 if not has_community: gaps.append("Community required") if not has_coaching: gaps.append("Group coaching required for price point") if not has_ai: gaps.append("AI support required")
else: # price > 500 # Need all 4 pillars score = pillars_present / 4.0 if not has_community: gaps.append("Community required") if not has_coaching: gaps.append("Coaching required") if not has_resources: gaps.append("Resources incomplete") if not has_ai: gaps.append("AI layer required")
if score < 1.0: recommendations.append("Add missing support pillars to match price point")
return score, gaps, recommendations
<tool name="calculate_completion_prediction" performance="<15ms"> Predict completion rate based on support strength and module design transformation_architecture (complete) predicted_completion_rate (0.0-1.0), factors, improvement_suggestions true
base_rate = 0.3 # Industry average ~30% completion
# Factor 1: Support system strength (max +0.30) support_score = calculate_support_score(architecture.support_system) support_boost = support_score * 0.30
# Factor 2: LDST completeness (max +0.20) ldst_score = validate_ldst_completeness(architecture.modules) ldst_boost = ldst_score * 0.20
# Factor 3: Breakthrough timing (max +0.15) if check_breakthrough_timing(architecture.transformation_map): breakthrough_boost = 0.15 else: breakthrough_boost = 0.0
# Factor 4: Community activation (max +0.15) community_strength = rate_community_activation(architecture.support_system.community) community_boost = community_strength * 0.15
# Factor 5: AI integration (max +0.10) ai_strength = rate_ai_integration(architecture.support_system.ai_layer) ai_boost = ai_strength * 0.10
# Factor 6: Complexity penalty (max -0.20) complexity_penalty = calculate_complexity_penalty(architecture.modules)
predicted_rate = base_rate + support_boost + ldst_boost + breakthrough_boost + community_boost + ai_boost - complexity_penalty predicted_rate = max(0.0, min(1.0, predicted_rate)) # Clamp to 0-1
factors = { 'base': base_rate, 'support': support_boost, 'ldst': ldst_boost, 'breakthrough': breakthrough_boost, 'community': community_boost, 'ai': ai_boost, 'complexity_penalty': -complexity_penalty }
improvements = [] if support_boost < 0.20: improvements.append("Strengthen support system (add pillars or enhance existing)") if ldst_score < 0.8: improvements.append("Complete LDST framework for all modules") if breakthrough_boost == 0: improvements.append("Engineer breakthrough for Days 7-14") if community_boost < 0.10: improvements.append("Add community rituals and activation") if complexity_penalty > 0.10: improvements.append("Simplify modules or add more support")
return predicted_rate, factors, improvements

reliability.human_review: Variable, subject to oversight and inconsistency

framework_definition.name: Transformation Architecture Framework
framework_definition.purpose: Design complete transformation ecosystems (default 90 days) that produce identity-level change through integrated support systems and consciousness-aware progression

when_to_use.use_case: Creating new digital programs, courses, or memberships
Designing hybrid offers (physical + digital + community + AI)
Structuring high-ticket coaching or consulting programs
Any product requiring behavior change and identity shift

not_for.case: Simple information products (ebooks, templates without transformation)
One-off services or consultations (no ongoing journey)
Existing programs that just need copy or marketing (use Sales Page or Email blocks)

input.name: avatar_bundle
input.description: Target customer's pains, desires, objections, sophistication, language

input.name: offer_seed
input.description: Initial offer concept, mechanism hypothesis, differentiation

input.name: evidence_pack
input.description: Proof of concept, case studies, research backing claims

input.name: constraints
input.description: Compliance limits, delivery constraints, tooling limits

output.name: transformation_map
output.description: Complete journey: Breakthrough → Milestones → Miracle → Identity
output.format: Structured object with proof markers per stage

output.name: program_architecture
output.description: 90-day structure: 3 phases, weekly outcomes, module design

output.name: consciousness_elevation_map
output.description: How transformation stages map to consciousness levels 1-6

output.name: completion_prediction
output.description: Predicted completion rate based on support and design
output.format: Percentage with factor breakdown and improvement suggestions

step.name: Define Transformation Map
step.description: Map the complete transformation journey from current state to identity shift

substeps.substep: Define Breakthrough (Days 7-14) - First "I can feel it working" moment
Define Miracle (Weeks 9-12) - Emotionally big, methodically achievable
Define Identity Shift - Clear before/after, belonging frame

validation.check: Identity shift has clear before/after articulation

step.name: Map Consciousness Elevation
step.description: Map transformation stages to consciousness levels (1-6) and 9D model

step.name: Design 90-Day Program Architecture
step.description: Structure transformation into 3 phases with weekly outcomes
step.weekly_outcomes: For each week, define: - Primary outcome (what they achieve this week) - Behavior change (what they start doing differently) - Proof marker (how they know it's working) - Support touchpoints (community, coaching, AI check-ins)

step.name: Design Modules Using LDST Framework
step.description: Structure each module with LEARN → DO → SHARE → TEACH

learn.content: One big idea, clearly explained, 8th grade entry
learn.depth: Technical appendix for those who want biohacker-level detail

teach.method: Explain back, help another member, create micro-case study
teach.purpose: Mastery through teaching, UGC generation, peer support

validation.check: DO task is achievable in 30 minutes
SHARE prompt is specific and actionable

step.name: Design 4-Pillar Support System
step.description: Build comprehensive support matching price and complexity

components.main_group: All members, general discussion, weekly challenges
components.rituals: Win posts, accountability check-ins, milestone celebrations

components.cadence: Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly based on tier
components.format: Office hours, hot seats, Q&A sessions, expert access
components.sla: Response time defined per tier (VIP=24h, Premium=48h, Core=72h)

components.check_ins: Daily or weekly prompts, progress tracking
components.personalization: Adaptive recommendations based on user data
components.boundaries: No medical diagnosis, no fabricated claims, escalates to human

step.name: Predict Completion and Optimize
step.description: Calculate predicted completion rate and identify improvements

prediction_factors.support_boost: Up to +0.30 based on pillar strength
prediction_factors.ldst_boost: Up to +0.20 based on framework completeness
prediction_factors.community_boost: Up to +0.15 based on activation strength
prediction_factors.ai_boost: Up to +0.10 based on AI integration quality
prediction_factors.complexity_penalty: Up to -0.20 based on program difficulty vs support

step.name: Validate Complete Architecture
step.description: Run all deterministic validations and iterate to quality threshold

validations.validation: No Constitutional violations (manipulation, hype, fake urgency)

if_below_threshold.identify_gaps: Run all validation tools, aggregate failures
if_below_threshold.rescore: Re-run all validations until threshold met

heuristics.rule: IF transformation_needs > 6_months THEN split_into_stacked_90day_programs REASON "90-day default maintains momentum and completion"
IF avatar_is_time_poor THEN lessons_15_20_min AND tasks_under_30_min REASON "Time constraints require efficiency"
IF avatar_is_skeptical_or_burned THEN breakthrough_week_1_2_mandatory AND proof_markers_every_week REASON "Need early wins to build belief"
IF predicted_completion < 50% THEN add_DO_SHARE_TEACH_before_more_LEARN REASON "Retention problem is support not information"
IF adding_physical_component THEN must_drive_critical_behaviors REASON "Physical only valuable if behavior-driving"
IF price > 200 THEN include_community_and_coaching_minimum REASON "Higher price requires higher support"
IF no_validation_signal THEN dont_build_full_program REASON "Validate first, build second"
IF ai_integration_feels_generic THEN bake_in_proprietary_method_and_examples REASON "AI should amplify YOUR unique approach"
IF first_cohort THEN founding_member_model AND iterate_fast REASON "Co-create with early adopters"
IF tiers_unclear THEN differentiation_is_content_based_redesign_around_support REASON "Tier by support level not content volume"

success_criteria.criterion: All modules have complete LDST structure
Support system adequacy ≥0.80 for price point
No Constitutional violations (manipulation, hype, fake urgency)
TEA handoff package complete and actionable

example.avatar: Age 35-60, can't sleep through night, exhausted, tried everything
example.mechanism: Circadian reset + hormonal optimization + stress management

breakthrough.outcome: Fall asleep in 15 min, sleep through night
breakthrough.proof_marker: Sleep tracker shows 7+ hours, dream recall returns

milestone.outcome: 30 consecutive nights quality sleep, energy restored
Hormonal balance restored, deep REM sleep

miracle.outcome: Brain fog gone, look 10 years younger, chronic issues resolve
miracle.proof_marker: Others comment on transformation, performance metrics improved

identity_shift.before_identity: Person who "can't sleep" and is always exhausted
identity_shift.after_identity: Person who sleeps perfectly and wakes energized
identity_shift.belonging_frame: Member of "Perfect Sleep" community, helps others solve sleep

week1.outcome: Understand sleep energy triangle, begin evening protocol
week1.behavior: Take evening supplement stack 90min before bed

week2.outcome: Master morning reset protocol, breakthrough achieved
week2.behavior: Morning sun exposure within 30min of waking
week2.proof_marker: Sleep through entire night 3+ times this week

week5-7.outcome: Deep REM sleep established, milestone achieved

week8-10.outcome: Brain fog eliminated, cognitive function restored
week8-10.proof_marker: Mental clarity like 20s, performance metrics improved

module_example.name: The Stress-Lock Solution
module_example.big_idea: Stress hormones block sleep hormones - must break the cycle

learn.content: Why stress prevents sleep (cortisol vs melatonin)
learn.technical_appendix: HPA axis, cortisol awakening response, circadian biology

do.success_criteria: Complete wind-down 60min before bed for 7 days
do.tracking: Check off in app or journal

share.prompt: Post your wind-down ritual + biggest stressor you're managing
share.purpose: Accountability + peer support + normalize stress management

teach.action: Share what's working, help troubleshoot others' approaches

community.main_group: General discussion, weekly challenges, win posts

check_ins.morning: Did you get morning sun? Sleep quality 1-10?
check_ins.evening: Evening protocol completed? Ready for bed?

ai_layer.personalization: Adjusts timing recommendations based on sleep data
ai_layer.friction_removal: Reminds evening dose 90min before typical bedtime

example.avatar: Agency owner, 30-50, client acquisition inconsistent, wants predictable pipeline
example.mechanism: AI-powered outreach + proven frameworks + implementation support

breakthrough.outcome: First qualified leads generated, system working

milestone.outcome: Predictable pipeline established, first client closed
Systematized client acquisition, team scaling begins

miracle.outcome: 10x revenue increase, agency transformed into predictable machine

identity_shift.after_identity: Confident CEO with predictable acquisition system
identity_shift.belonging_frame: Member of elite agency owner network

support_system.community: Elite agency owner mastermind (30 members max)
support_system.coaching: Weekly group coaching + monthly 1:1 strategy calls

resources.physical: CRM setup, AI tools access, scripts, templates

anti_pattern.name: Information Dump
anti_pattern.description: 40+ videos, no clear progression, overwhelming content volume
anti_pattern.why_bad: Violates "Transformation > Information" doctrine, causes overwhelm, tanks completion
anti_pattern.example: Course with 50 lessons, no clear milestones, "learn everything about X"

recovery.step: Extract transformation map (what actually needs to change?)
Focus on behavior change not information

anti_pattern.name: No Support System
anti_pattern.description: Content-only product, no community, no coaching, no AI, just videos + PDFs
anti_pattern.why_bad: Completion rates <20%, no accountability, customers feel alone
anti_pattern.example: $297 course with 20 videos and worksheets, nothing else

recovery.step: Create SHARE prompts for every module

anti_pattern.name: Unrealistic Timelines / Hype Promises
anti_pattern.description: "Lose 50 lbs in 30 days!" or "10x your business in 2 weeks!"
anti_pattern.why_bad: Constitutional violation (evidence honesty), damages trust, refund avalanche
anti_pattern.example: Weight loss program promising impossible results without evidence

recovery.step: Review all timeline claims against EVIDENCE_PACK

anti_pattern.name: Random Bonus Pile
anti_pattern.description: Main program + 15 random bonuses that don't integrate
anti_pattern.why_bad: Violates "Whole Solution" principle, creates confusion, no coherence
anti_pattern.example: "Buy this course + get these 12 unrelated templates and 3 bonus trainings"

recovery.step: Remove all bonuses that don't directly support transformation
Integrate remaining components into main program
Cross-reference everything (mention physical in digital, etc)

anti_pattern.name: Build Before Validate
anti_pattern.description: Spend months building complete program before testing demand
anti_pattern.why_bad: Violates "Validate First" doctrine, wastes time, may build wrong thing
anti_pattern.example: 6 months creating 50-video course, launch to crickets

recovery.step: If signal strong, build MVP and iterate with founding members

anti_pattern.name: Selling "AI" Instead of Outcomes
anti_pattern.description: Marketing focuses on "AI-powered" not transformation delivered
anti_pattern.why_bad: Violates "Human Core, AI Shell" - AI is amplifier not differentiator
anti_pattern.example: "Our AI generates your content" vs "We help you grow audience 10x"

recovery.step: Reframe all copy around transformation outcome
Bake your proprietary method into AI
Lead with outcome, mention AI as enabler

anti_pattern.name: Launch Obsession, Delivery Neglect
anti_pattern.description: Perfect launch campaign, terrible onboarding and support
anti_pattern.why_bad: Great sales, terrible retention, refund requests, bad reputation

enhances.reason: Transformation architecture feeds into offer packaging
Architecture defines what onboarding must deliver

sister_skill.relationship: PCG defines WHAT (architecture), TEA defines HOW (implementation)

upstream_inputs.provides: Avatar language, pain points, desires, objections, proof sources

builds.item: Delivery mechanics (how to run the program)

track_patterns.pattern: Which breakthrough types lead to highest completion?
What support combinations work best for each price point?
Which LDST variations drive most engagement?
What consciousness progressions feel most natural?
Which identity shifts resonate most powerfully?

refinement_process.step: Analyze usage patterns (which variations work best?)
Identify failure modes (where do architectures break?)
If quality improves, apply patch and increment version

planned_improvements.improvement: Add more granular completion prediction factors

tier.name: enterprise
tier.description: Unlimited team, white-label rights, custom templates

test.name: LDST Completeness Check
test.input: Program with 12 modules, all with LDST

test.name: Support Adequacy for $297 Program
test.input: Support system with Community + Coaching + AI, price=$297

test.name: Completion Prediction
test.input: Well-designed architecture (strong support, LDST complete, breakthrough present)

test.name: Identity Shift Clarity
test.input: Clear before/after identity with belonging frame

test.name: Complete Architecture Validation
test.expected: All validations PASS, MMA score ≥9.0, ready for TEA handoff

quick_start.step: 1. Gather avatar insights (pains, desires, language) from Market Intelligence
3. Define transformation map (Breakthrough → Milestones → Miracle → Identity)
5. Design 90-day program structure (3 phases, weekly outcomes)
10. Handoff to TEA for implementation design

troubleshooting.solution: Add support elements (community rituals, coaching, AI check-ins) before adding content. Check LDST completeness.
Redesign Phase 1 to engineer earlier win. Simplify initial task, add support, make proof marker more tangible.
troubleshooting.issue: Support adequacy score low for price point
troubleshooting.solution: Add missing pillars. $200-500 needs Community + Coaching + AI minimum. >$500 needs all 4 pillars.
Add missing components to modules. Every module must have DO task, SHARE prompt, TEACH opportunity.
Articulate specific before/after. Use "I'm the person who..." format. Add community belonging frame.

faq.q: Can this be used for programs shorter than 90 days?
faq.a: Yes, but 90-day is optimal for identity-level transformation. Shorter programs work for skill acquisition or quick wins, but deep transformation typically needs 90 days.
faq.q: What if transformation naturally takes 6+ months?
faq.a: Stack multiple 90-day programs. Each program = one major phase. Maintains momentum and completion better than single 6-month program.
faq.q: How do I know if support system is adequate?
faq.a: Use check_support_system_adequacy() tool. Match support to price: <$200 = Community+AI, $200-500 = +Coaching, >$500 = All 4 pillars.
faq.q: What's the minimum for breakthrough engineering?
faq.a: Must happen Days 7-14, must be tangible/measurable, must build belief in full transformation. Use check_breakthrough_timing() to validate.
No - consciousness awareness is Constitutional requirement. Ensures natural progression, prevents manipulation, maximizes completion.
